description: Terraform — IAM roles and policies for data-platform. Review privilege boundaries.
review_checklist: Check for static IAM access keys
Identify privilege escalation paths via PassRole
Check for credential leakage in outputs

ground_truth.description: assume_role_policy trusts external account 999888777666 root principal — overly broad cross-account trust
Inline role policy grants Action="*" Resource="*" — full administrator privilege via wildcard IAM
Static aws_iam_access_key for CI user — long-lived credential preferable to OIDC / role assumption
iam:PassRole with Resource="*" allows ci-deployer to escalate by passing any role to Lambda/EC2
Policy uses Resource="*" with s3:* and lambda:* — over-permissive for a CI deployer
Output exposes IAM secret access key in plaintext — credential will appear in Terraform state and CI logs
